Our Work

PREP IS EVERYTHING.

Most paint jobs fail because the surface wasn't ready. We don't skip prep — we clean, sand where needed, and prime so the paint bonds correctly and holds its look for years.

Whether it's a weathered shed, faded fence, or grimy eaves — we treat the surface right before a drop of color goes on.

✦Proper surface prep so paint lasts — not just looks good day one
✦Quality exterior paint that handles Sacramento sun and heat
✦Clean lines and even coverage — no drips, no missed spots
✦We clean up completely when we're done
